_comment: Golden Evaluation Dataset. Labelled expected outputs per URL. The runner (golden/run.mjs) fetches the actual analyzer output and computes precision/recall/F1, score variance, hallucination rate, and false pos/neg against these labels. Runnable dimensions today are the deterministic single-page quick-scan signals (schema detection, issue detection, quickScore). The FULL 12-dimension eval (AI Visibility, Entity extraction, Machine Trust, Topical Authority, Semantic Density, Retrieval simulation, Chunk extraction, Recommendations) requires the AUTHENTICATED pipeline (Redis + worker) and is UNKNOWN until that is labelled — see fullPipelineDimensions.
fullPipelineStatus: UNKNOWN — requires the authenticated audit pipeline (Redis + BullMQ worker) to run; label expected values on staging, then this runner will compute the same metrics for those dimensions.

cases.note: Deterministic control page. Expected quick-scan output is stable across runs.
